creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
mezz@FreeBSD.org writes:

> I can't reproduce with your #1 issue about automake rerun here.
> As for the #2, I don't see there is anything that need to be changed
> when it works fine as now.

Those aren't separate issues. #1 is due to bitrot[1] of #2. And the
issue *probably* only happens on 10.0[2].

[1] lines change regularly but maintainer may notice not notice
[2] http://pastebin.com/xuyMGrhh # gegl-0.1.8_4.log
